name: Dash-Gear Bot
oracle_text: Alt-Mode (Speedster) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 3/0 and it gains haste. Activate only as a sorcery.
flavor_text: Built for the fast lane, even if they lack the fuel to stay there long.
design_notes: Designed for the WR (Rapid Strike) archetype. As a common artifact creature, it provides an efficient way to trade utility/survivability (the 1/2 robot mode) for immediate explosive combat power (the 3/0 speedster mode with haste). The P+T follows common guidelines by remaining at a total of 3, simply shifting the distribution between power and toughness. This allows players to play it early as a blocker or utility piece, then pivot into an aggressive threat during a main phase.
